title: Neptra Ear Drops Solution for Dogs - Product defect recall alert
body: "We wish to inform retailers that the wholesaler, MWI Animal Health, has initiated a Class II recall to retailer level with immediate effect for Neptra Ear Drops Solution for Dogs Vm 04895/5007.  The reason for recall is that Batch Number E154100A was distributed by one UK wholesaler after batch expiry. No other batches are affected.    This recall is for:     Batch number Expiry date     E154100A 31/07/2025     For further information regarding the recall, please contact MWI; customerteam@mwiah.co.uk>. "
